# 2 "/workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-3/056_short_circuit.sysu.c" 2$
int g = 0;$
$
int func(int n) {$
  g = g + n;$
  _sysy_putint(g);$
  return g;$
}$
$
int main() {$
  int i;$
  i = _sysy_getint();$
  if (i > 10 && func(i)) i = 1; else i = 0;$
  i = _sysy_getint();$
  if (i > 11 && func(i)) i = 1; else i = 0;$
  i = _sysy_getint();$
  if (i <= 99 || func(i)) i = 1; else i = 0;$
  i = _sysy_getint();$
